chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 2061 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.4925/2017 (S/A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.4878/2017 (151 CPC) 3. For hearing of CMA No.6625/2017 (151 CPC) 4. For hearing of CMA No.5615/2016 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 22.02.2023 Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Rizwana Memon, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Kareem Bux Janwari, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition on the ground that no notice has been repeated upon the petitioner after impugned notice(s) for appearance on 09.05.2016 and since seven years have passed, no investigation or inquiry has been initiated as per his knowledge; however, he seeks permission that in case any notice is issued to the petitioner, he shall be at liberty to repeat a fresh petition. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach this Court afresh in case any further proceeding is being taken pursuant to the impugned notice(s). J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
